specs.name: blood
specs.description: A dark guardian who manipulates and corrupts life energy to sustain themselves in the face of an enemy onslaught. Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

specs.name: frost
specs.description: An icy harbinger of doom, channeling runic power and delivering vicious weapon strikes. Preferred Weapons: Dual Axes, Maces, Swords

specs.name: unholy
specs.description: A master of death and decay, spreading infection and controlling undead minions to do their bidding. Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

specs.name: devourer
specs.description: Harnesses the power of the void to crush their enemies and feast on their souls. Preferred Weapons: Warglaives, Swords, Axes, Fist Weapons.

specs.name: havoc
specs.description: A brooding master of warglaives and the destructive power of Fel magic. Preferred Weapons: Warglaives, Swords, Axes, Fist Weapons

specs.name: vengeance
specs.description: Embraces the demon within to incinerate enemies and protect their allies. Preferred Weapons: Warglaives, Swords, Axes, Fist Weapons

specs.name: balance
specs.description: Can shapeshift into a powerful Moonkin, balancing the power of Arcane and Nature magic to destroy enemies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: feral
specs.description: Takes on the form of a great cat to deal damage with bleeds and bites. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

specs.name: guardian
specs.description: Takes on the form of a mighty bear to absorb damage and protect allies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

specs.name: restoration
specs.description: Channels powerful Nature magic to regenerate and revitalize allies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: augmentation
specs.description: Imbues allies with the might of the Black dragons, and bends time & fate in their favor with Bronze magic. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: devastation
specs.description: Releases innate power as chaotic Red flames or focused Blue magic to bathe the battlefield in destruction. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: preservation
specs.description: Calls upon the Emerald Dream to rejuvenate life, and the Bronze sands of time to prevent harm. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Sword, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: beast-mastery
specs.description: A master of the wild who can tame a wide variety of beasts to assist them in combat. Preferred Weapon: Bow, Crossbow, Gun

specs.name: marksmanship
specs.description: A master sharpshooter who excels in bringing down enemies from afar. Preferred Weapon: Bow, Crossbow, Gun

specs.name: survival
specs.description: An adaptive ranger who favors using explosives, animal venom, and coordinated attacks with their bonded beast. Preferred Weapon: Polearm, Staff, Axe, Dagger, Sword

specs.name: arcane
specs.description: Manipulates raw Arcane magic, destroying enemies with overwhelming power. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

specs.name: fire
specs.description: Focuses the pure essence of Fire magic, assaulting enemies with combustive flames. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

specs.name: frost
specs.description: Freezes enemies in their tracks and shatters them with Frost magic. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

specs.name: brewmaster
specs.description: A sturdy brawler who uses unpredictable movement and mystical brews to avoid damage and protect allies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

specs.name: mistweaver
specs.description: A healer who masters the mysterious art of manipulating life energies aided by the wisdom of the Jade Serpent. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Mace, Sword

specs.name: windwalker
specs.description: A martial artist without peer who pummels foes with hands and fists. Preferred Weapons: Fist Weapons, Axes, Maces, Swords

specs.name: holy
specs.description: Invokes the power of the Light to heal and protect allies and vanquish evil from the darkest corners of the world. Preferred Weapon: Sword, Mace, and Shield

specs.name: protection
specs.description: Uses Holy magic to shield themselves and defend allies from attackers. Preferred Weapon: Sword, Mace, Axe, and Shield

specs.name: retribution
specs.description: A righteous crusader who judges and punishes opponents with weapons and Holy magic. Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Sword, Mace, Axe

specs.name: discipline
specs.description:
Shields allies from harm and cures their wounds by smiting enemies.
Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: holy
specs.description: A versatile healer who can reverse damage on individuals or groups and even heal from beyond the grave. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: shadow
specs.description: Uses sinister Shadow magic and terrifying Void magic to eradicate enemies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Mace

specs.name: assassination
specs.description: A deadly master of poisons who dispatches victims with vicious dagger strikes. Preferred Weapons: Daggers

specs.name: outlaw
specs.description: A ruthless fugitive who uses agility and guile to stand toe-to-toe with enemies. Preferred Weapons: Axes, Maces, Swords, Fist Weapons

specs.name: subtlety
specs.description: A dark stalker who leaps from the shadows to ambush their unsuspecting prey. Preferred Weapons: Daggers

specs.name: elemental
specs.description: A spellcaster who harnesses the destructive forces of nature and the elements. Preferred Weapon: Mace, Dagger, and Shield

specs.name: enhancement
specs.description: A totemic warrior who strikes foes with weapons imbued with elemental power. Preferred Weapons: Dual Axes, Maces, Fist Weapons

specs.name: restoration
specs.description: A healer who calls upon ancestral spirits and the cleansing power of water to mend allies' wounds. Preferred Weapon: Mace, Dagger, and Shield

specs.name: affliction
specs.description: A master of shadow magic who specializes in drains and damage-over-time spells. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

specs.name: demonology
specs.description: A commander of demons who twists the souls of their army into devastating power. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

specs.name: destruction
specs.description: A master of chaos who calls down fire to burn and demolish enemies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

specs.name: arms
specs.description: A battle-hardened master of weapons, using mobility and overpowering attacks to strike their opponents down. Preferred Weapon: Two-Handed Axe, Mace, Sword

specs.name: fury
specs.description: A furious dual-wielding berserker unleashing a flurry of attacks to carve their opponents to pieces. Preferred Weapons: Dual Two-Handed Axes, Maces, Swords

specs.name: protection
specs.description: A stalwart protector who uses a shield to safeguard themselves and their allies. Preferred Weapon: Axe, Mace, Sword, and Shield
